classificationRules: UnknownNeedsClassification and deferred entries must include explicit knownLimitations.
Protection stage values must use canonical vocabulary and remain aligned with staged rollout docs.
remainingLimitations: Route discovery is text-level and does not execute full runtime endpoint graph inspection.
Some inventory entries are intentionally aggregated as MULTI and need future split refinement.
Staged/deferred limitations remain and are documented instead of over-claimed.
nonClaims: No full multi-tenant isolation claim yet.
No global EF query filter claim.
